final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic concept art matte painting for a Mars colony panorama set in the year 2387.

Style/medium: hard science fiction concept art, photorealistic CGI matte painting, reference Syd Mead and Blade Runner 2049 production design
Composition: wide panoramic vista, eye-level establishing shot, 24mm wide-angle lens, deep depth of field showing layered depth from foreground to Olympus Mons
Subject: massive transparent geodesic dome city clusters rising from red desert terrain, dome interiors showing lush vegetation and high-rise architecture, foreground team of explorers in advanced spacesuits conducting geological survey, multi-wheeled Mars rovers parked nearby
Scene/backdrop: Martian desert landscape with characteristic ochre-red regolith, distant silhouette of Olympus Mons on horizon, orange-red Martian sky with thin atmospheric haze
Lighting/mood: directional sunlight simulating actual Martian illumination conditions, long shadows, clear atmospheric perspective, epic and awe-inspiring scale
Color palette: ochre red and burnt orange as dominant base, warm yellow accents, cool silver-gray for technology and suits, subtle blue atmospheric haze at horizon
Materials/textures: dusty regolith with fine particle detail, transparent polymer dome surfaces with subtle reflections, metallic solar arrays and terraforming equipment, advanced composite spacesuit materials
Avoid: fantasy elements, magical lighting, Earth-like blue sky, 8K stuffer labels, oversaturated neon colors, cartoon proportions
